_comment: Canonical cron job definitions for the book-pipeline repo. Applied via `book-pipeline openclaw register-cron` when the gateway is authenticated. Source of truth for Phase 2 Plan 06 nightly-ingest registration.

jobs.name: book-pipeline:nightly-ingest
jobs.description: Nightly corpus re-ingest (Phase 2 Plan 06 / RAG-04 + CORPUS-01). Rebuild the 5 LanceDB tables if any Our Lady of Champion bible's mtime changed.

payload.message: Run nightly ingest: book-pipeline ingest; if any corpus file mtime changed, rebuild the 5 LanceDB tables. Details: Phase 2 Plan 06 (RAG-04 baseline maintenance + CORPUS-01 freshness).

jobs._manual_register_cmd: openclaw cron add --name 'book-pipeline:nightly-ingest' --cron '0 2 * * *' --tz 'America/New_York' --session isolated --agent drafter --message 'Run nightly ingest: book-pipeline ingest; if any corpus file mtime changed, rebuild the 5 LanceDB tables. Details: Phase 2 Plan 06 (RAG-04 baseline maintenance + CORPUS-01 freshness).' --wake now --token "$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN"
